heading: Acceptance of membership
label: 290k Acceptance of membership
text: The President is hereby authorized to accept membership for the United States in the Multilateral Investment Guarantee Agency (hereinafter in this subchapter referred to as the “Agency”) provided for by the Convention Establishing the Multilateral Investment Guarantee Agency (hereinafter in this subchapter referred to as the “Convention”) deposited in the archives of the International Bank for Reconstruction and Development (hereinafter in this subchapter referred to as the “Bank”).
notes: CodificationSection is based on section 403 of title IV of H.R. 3750, One Hundredth Congress, as introduced , and enacted into law by .Dec. 11, 1987Pub. L. 100–202“This title [enacting this subchapter] shall be codified as subchapter XXVI of chapter 7 of title 22 of the United States Code.”
